Name: Crab
Description: This is no ordinary beachcomber; this is a heavily armored titan with claws strong enough to break a high-test line like so much thread. With its glowing blue eyes and spiky back, it’s no longer a crustacean but more like a living part of the reef itself. Fact: Crabs have a unique exoskeleton that is a kind of armor, which forces them to molt their entire shell just to grow a few inches.
